title: Review: feat: change URI scheme to secretx:backend:path
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — the change is mechanical (regex replace) and the parser logic is simple. The main risk is the error message bug which will confuse migrating users but does not affect any correct usage.
Confidence: 92% chance of no missed functional bug. Uncertainty driven by: no live integration test of the backward-compat path, and percent-decode behavior in edge cases not exercised. Would raise confidence with: a test that exercises the backward-compat error path end-to-end.
